creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

  Log:
  - Updated to 1.00.
  - Use CPAN macro.
  - Add USE_DOS2UNIX.
  - Avoid portlint warnings on {BUILD,RUN}_DEPENDS.
  - Remove post-configure stage in Makefile.
  - Rebuild pkg-descr.
  - Remove unnecessary patches.
  - Update and fix pkg-plist.
  - Take maintainership.
  
  PR:             ports/120849
  Submitted by:   lippe
